title: Finite Stochastic Kernel Checks

solver_reuse.target: finite stochastic-kernel bad-row QF_LRA/Farkas regression seed
solver_reuse.pressure: Malformed finite probability-transition row where the exact rational entries 3/5 and 3/5 sum to 6/5 but stochastic-kernel normalization requires row sum 1.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional kernel, Markov-chain, or policy-transition rows only when they add distinct exact-linear solver pressure; keep regular conditional probabilities and general disintegration in the Lean-horizon lane.

graduation_criteria: Encode finite kernels as labeled source-to-target probability tables.
Replay kernel normalization, pushforward, joint factorization, disintegration, and composition by exact rational sums.
Emit checked finite counterexample evidence for malformed kernel rows; the bad-row normalization conflict now has checked QF_LRA/Farkas evidence.
Keep regular conditional probabilities, disintegration theorems, and general Markov kernels on measurable spaces marked Lean-horizon until no-sorry Lean artifacts exist.
